final:
module binary_counter (
  input clk,
  input reset,
  output reg [3:0] count
);

  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @ (posedge clk, posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
  if (reset) begin
    count <= 4'b0;
  end else begin
    count <= count + 1;
  end
end

endmodule
